Trails.Name: Lost in the Woods (Lower) Uphill Route
Lost in the Woods (Upper) Uphill Route

_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
Saturday, February 28, 2026 6:15 AM – Cloudy skies this morning are forecast to give way to mostly sunny conditions later today. Expect warm temps with moderate winds that grow gusty this afternoon. 24 lifts are scheduled to spin, conditions permitting. Snow will be hard and fast this morning, especially in shaded, upper-mountain areas. Please use caution and ski within your ability. Some terrain may be proactively closed in the morning and opened later as conditions allow. 

From the new 22' halfpipe and the JLA Slalom to Woolly’s Adventure Summit Happy Hour, Woolly’s Dance Party, and live music at all 3 base lodges, there’s plenty happening on the mountain today. Check out the Events Calendar for more info.  
 
Conditions and Visibility: Cloudy skies give way to mostly sunny conditions later this morning. Warm temps into the 50s today. Moderate SW winds may become gustier this afternoon.  
Lift status: 24 lifts are scheduled to spin today, conditions permitting. Snow conditions are hard and fast in the morning, so please use extra caution in shady areas higher on the mountain. Some terrain may be proactively closed in the morning and opened later as conditions allow. 
Safety: Find terrain that suits your ability. Accidents often happen when skiers and riders move into terrain beyond their comfort level. Take a moment to plan your route using a trail map or the Ikon App. Visit our Safety page for more tips. Our on-mountain emergency hotline is: 760.934.0611 
Road Conditions: Always be prepared for winter mountain driving and watch for icy patches in shaded areas. Check our Road Conditions page for the latest status.
_inspectorSnowReport.SafetyReport:
Put the bar down.
On-mountain emergency hotline: 760.934.0611
